# AIGP - AI Graphic Protocol

> AIGP is a universal JSON standard for AI-native diagram creation. Instead of generating fragile text syntax (Mermaid, PlantUML), generate structured JSON that validates, auto-layouts, and exports to any format.

## Quick Start

Generate a valid AIGP JSON document. No positions needed — auto-layout handles placement.

```json
{
  "schema": "https://aigraphia.com/schema/v1",
  "version": "1.0.0",
  "type": "flowchart",
  "metadata": {
    "title": "Diagram Title",
    "description": "Brief description",
    "author": "ai-agent",
    "created": "2026-01-01T00:00:00Z"
  },
  "graph": {
    "nodes": [
      { "id": "start", "type": "start", "label": "Start", "data": {} },
      { "id": "process", "type": "process", "label": "Do Something", "data": {} },
      { "id": "end", "type": "end", "label": "End", "data": {} }
    ],
    "edges": [
      { "id": "e1", "type": "flow", "source": "start", "target": "process", "data": {} },
      { "id": "e2", "type": "flow", "source": "process", "target": "end", "data": {} }
    ]
  },
  "layout": {
    "algorithm": "hierarchical",
    "direction": "TB"
  }
}
```

## Required Fields

Every AIGP document must have:
- `schema`: Always `"https://aigraphia.com/schema/v1"`
- `version`: Always `"1.0.0"`
- `type`: One of the diagram types below
- `metadata`: Object with at least `title`
- `graph`: Object with `nodes` array and `edges` array
- `layout`: Object with `algorithm` (and optionally `direction`)

Every node must have: `id`, `type`, `label`, `data`
Every edge must have: `id`, `type`, `source`, `target`, `data`
Edges may optionally have: `label`

## Diagram Types

### Software Engineering
- `flowchart` — Process flows, algorithms, decision trees
- `sequence` — Temporal interactions, API calls, message flows
- `architecture` — System design, microservices, infrastructure
- `uml-class` — Object-oriented design, class hierarchies
- `er` — Database schema, entity relationships
- `state-machine` — State transitions, finite automata

### Business & Process
- `bpmn` — Business processes, workflows
- `org-chart` — Organizational structure, reporting lines
- `customer-journey` — User experiences, touchpoints
- `value-stream` — Process steps with metrics
- `kanban` — Task boards, workflow stages

### Data & Analysis
- `mind-map` — Brainstorming, concept exploration
- `concept-map` — Knowledge relationships
- `timeline` — Project planning, history, roadmaps
- `sankey` — Flow analysis, resource allocation
- `funnel` — Conversion analysis, sales pipelines
- `network` — Generic node-edge graphs

## Node Types by Diagram

### flowchart
- `start` — Entry point
- `end` — Exit point
- `process` — Processing step
- `decision` — Conditional branch (diamond shape)
- `input` — Input/output operation
- `subprocess` — Nested process

### sequence
- `actor` — Human actor (requires `data.lifeline: true`)
- `object` — System component (requires `data.lifeline: true`)
- `database` — Database (requires `data.lifeline: true`)

### architecture
- `service` — Microservice
- `database` — Database
- `cache` — Cache layer (Redis, etc.)
- `queue` — Message queue (Kafka, RabbitMQ, etc.)
- `storage` — Object/file storage
- `loadbalancer` — Load balancer
- `external` — Third-party service

### er
- `entity` — Database table/entity
- `relationship` — Relationship connector

### uml-class
- `class` — Class definition
- `interface` — Interface
- `enum` — Enumeration
- `abstract` — Abstract class

### org-chart
- `executive` — C-level
- `manager` — Manager
- `employee` — Individual contributor
- `contractor` — Contractor
- `vacant` — Open position

### mind-map
- `central` — Central topic (exactly one required)
- `main` — Main branch
- `sub` — Sub-topic
- `detail` — Detail leaf

### state-machine
- `state` — Regular state
- `initial` — Initial state
- `final` — Final/accepting state

## Edge Types

### General
- `flow` — Standard directional flow
- `conditional` — Conditional branch (use `label` for condition)
- `data-flow` — Data movement

### Sequence-specific
- `sync` — Synchronous message
- `async` — Asynchronous message
- `return` — Return message

### Architecture-specific
- `http` — HTTP/REST connection
- `grpc` — gRPC connection
- `data` — Data connection
- `event` — Event/message

## Layout Algorithms

- `hierarchical` — Tree/DAG layout (best for flowcharts, org charts). Supports `direction`: `TB`, `BT`, `LR`, `RL`
- `layered` — Layered/Sugiyama layout (best for architecture diagrams)
- `force` — Force-directed layout (best for network diagrams)
- `radial` — Radial layout (best for mind maps)
- `circular` — Circular arrangement
- `timeline` — Left-to-right temporal layout (best for sequence diagrams)
- `grid` — Grid arrangement (best for kanban boards)

## Output Guidance

### For chat interfaces (ChatGPT, Claude, etc.)
1. Generate the AIGP JSON
2. Also provide a Mermaid equivalent as a fenced code block for immediate rendering
3. Link to the editor: `https://aigraphia.com/view?data={base64url_encoded_json}`

### For code editors (VS Code, Cursor)
1. Write the AIGP JSON to a `.json` file
2. The AIGraphia extension renders it automatically

### For programmatic use
1. Generate the AIGP JSON
2. Use `@aigp/converters` to export to Mermaid, SVG, PNG, or other formats

## Key Principles

1. **No positions** — Never specify `position` or `size` on nodes. Auto-layout handles placement.
2. **Descriptive IDs** — Use readable IDs like `"userLogin"`, `"authService"`, not `"n1"`, `"n2"`.
3. **Semantic types** — Use the correct node/edge types for the diagram type.
4. **Minimal data** — Only include fields that add value. Empty `data: {}` is fine.
5. **One diagram type** — Don't mix types. Choose the best fit for the content.

## Common Mistakes

- Adding `position` or `x`/`y` coordinates to nodes (auto-layout handles this)
- Using numeric IDs (`"1"`, `"2"`) instead of descriptive ones
- Forgetting `data.lifeline: true` on sequence diagram nodes
- Forgetting the `central` node in mind maps
- Missing required fields (`data` on nodes/edges is required, even if empty)

## Full Examples

### Flowchart: User Login

```json
{
  "schema": "https://aigraphia.com/schema/v1",
  "version": "1.0.0",
  "type": "flowchart",
  "metadata": { "title": "User Login Flow" },
  "graph": {
    "nodes": [
      { "id": "start", "type": "start", "label": "Start", "data": {} },
      { "id": "enterCreds", "type": "input", "label": "Enter Credentials", "data": {} },
      { "id": "validate", "type": "process", "label": "Validate", "data": {} },
      { "id": "isValid", "type": "decision", "label": "Valid?", "data": {} },
      { "id": "grantAccess", "type": "process", "label": "Grant Access", "data": {} },
      { "id": "showError", "type": "process", "label": "Show Error", "data": {} },
      { "id": "end", "type": "end", "label": "End", "data": {} }
    ],
    "edges": [
      { "id": "e1", "type": "flow", "source": "start", "target": "enterCreds", "data": {} },
      { "id": "e2", "type": "flow", "source": "enterCreds", "target": "validate", "data": {} },
      { "id": "e3", "type": "flow", "source": "validate", "target": "isValid", "data": {} },
      { "id": "e4", "type": "conditional", "source": "isValid", "target": "grantAccess", "label": "Yes", "data": {} },
      { "id": "e5", "type": "conditional", "source": "isValid", "target": "showError", "label": "No", "data": {} },
      { "id": "e6", "type": "flow", "source": "grantAccess", "target": "end", "data": {} },
      { "id": "e7", "type": "flow", "source": "showError", "target": "enterCreds", "data": {} }
    ]
  },
  "layout": { "algorithm": "hierarchical", "direction": "TB" }
}
```

### Sequence: OAuth 2.0

```json
{
  "schema": "https://aigraphia.com/schema/v1",
  "version": "1.0.0",
  "type": "sequence",
  "metadata": { "title": "OAuth 2.0 Authorization Code Flow" },
  "graph": {
    "nodes": [
      { "id": "user", "type": "actor", "label": "User", "data": { "lifeline": true } },
      { "id": "client", "type": "object", "label": "Client App", "data": { "lifeline": true } },
      { "id": "authServer", "type": "object", "label": "Auth Server", "data": { "lifeline": true } },
      { "id": "resource", "type": "object", "label": "Resource API", "data": { "lifeline": true } }
    ],
    "edges": [
      { "id": "e1", "type": "sync", "source": "user", "target": "client", "label": "Login", "data": { "timestamp": 1 } },
      { "id": "e2", "type": "sync", "source": "client", "target": "authServer", "label": "Authorization Request", "data": { "timestamp": 2 } },
      { "id": "e3", "type": "return", "source": "authServer", "target": "client", "label": "Authorization Code", "data": { "timestamp": 3 } },
      { "id": "e4", "type": "sync", "source": "client", "target": "authServer", "label": "Exchange Code for Token", "data": { "timestamp": 4 } },
      { "id": "e5", "type": "return", "source": "authServer", "target": "client", "label": "Access Token", "data": { "timestamp": 5 } },
      { "id": "e6", "type": "sync", "source": "client", "target": "resource", "label": "API Request + Token", "data": { "timestamp": 6 } },
      { "id": "e7", "type": "return", "source": "resource", "target": "client", "label": "Protected Data", "data": { "timestamp": 7 } }
    ]
  },
  "layout": { "algorithm": "timeline", "direction": "TB" }
}
```

### Architecture: Microservices

```json
{
  "schema": "https://aigraphia.com/schema/v1",
  "version": "1.0.0",
  "type": "architecture",
  "metadata": { "title": "E-Commerce Microservices" },
  "graph": {
    "nodes": [
      { "id": "lb", "type": "loadbalancer", "label": "Load Balancer", "data": {} },
      { "id": "apiGateway", "type": "service", "label": "API Gateway", "data": {} },
      { "id": "authService", "type": "service", "label": "Auth Service", "data": {} },
      { "id": "productService", "type": "service", "label": "Product Service", "data": {} },
      { "id": "orderService", "type": "service", "label": "Order Service", "data": {} },
      { "id": "postgres", "type": "database", "label": "PostgreSQL", "data": {} },
      { "id": "redis", "type": "cache", "label": "Redis Cache", "data": {} },
      { "id": "kafka", "type": "queue", "label": "Kafka", "data": {} }
    ],
    "edges": [
      { "id": "e1", "type": "http", "source": "lb", "target": "apiGateway", "data": {} },
      { "id": "e2", "type": "http", "source": "apiGateway", "target": "authService", "data": {} },
      { "id": "e3", "type": "http", "source": "apiGateway", "target": "productService", "data": {} },
      { "id": "e4", "type": "http", "source": "apiGateway", "target": "orderService", "data": {} },
      { "id": "e5", "type": "data", "source": "authService", "target": "postgres", "data": {} },
      { "id": "e6", "type": "data", "source": "productService", "target": "postgres", "data": {} },
      { "id": "e7", "type": "data", "source": "orderService", "target": "postgres", "data": {} },
      { "id": "e8", "type": "data", "source": "productService", "target": "redis", "data": {} },
      { "id": "e9", "type": "event", "source": "orderService", "target": "kafka", "data": {} },
      { "id": "e10", "type": "event", "source": "kafka", "target": "productService", "label": "inventory update", "data": {} }
    ]
  },
  "layout": { "algorithm": "layered", "direction": "TB" }
}
```

## Packages (npm)

- `@aigp/protocol` — Core schema and validation
- `@aigp/plugins` — Diagram type implementations
- `@aigp/layout` — Auto-layout engines
- `@aigp/cli` — Command-line tool
- `@aigp/converters` — Format conversion (Mermaid, etc.)
- `@aigp/export` — SVG/PNG rendering

## Links

- Schema: https://aigraphia.com/schema/v1
- Editor: https://aigraphia.com
- GitHub: https://github.com/aigp/aigp
- npm: https://www.npmjs.com/package/@aigp/protocol
